text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: One, two! Three, four! Five, six! Heaven 'n hell!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Whatcha think of my dance?!
choice_data_list:
It was very good. Like watching a little nimble
fairy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But I guess you could say that the way I pick up on stuff so quick is kinda like magic.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can see fans goin' wild at my next winnin'
concert. Just like last time...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not satisfied with the show I've been
puttin' on!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I need somethin' a li'l more fiery to bring some
oomph. A peppery kick, like ya get with red
ginger!
choice_data_list:
Why not incorporate some acrobatics into the
choreography?

Why not incorporate a comedy routine into your
performance?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, I like that! And I could pull it off, easy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, how hard could a moonsault be, yeah?
Don't go blinkin' or nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that boast, Tamamo Cross breaks into a
run...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Only to crash into a wall. I can't keep myself
from bursting out laughing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! What're you laughin' at?! But eh, I guess I did get a laugh outta ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You sayin' I oughta put my gags in the
show?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm kinda bashful on stage, though... Not sure I
got it in me, but I'll give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Howja like my dancin'? I think it's pretty en
pointe myself. Get it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross is as energetic and playful as ever.
